about.title: About me
about.lead: A bit about my journey and what I look for in each project.
about.p1: I'm a front-end developer passionate about building modern, responsive, and functional interfaces. I have experience with Vue.js, Vuetify, and other web ecosystem technologies, always striving to combine performance, design, and usability.
about.p2: My focus is turning ideas into professional digital experiences, combining best development practices with innovative design. I enjoy working on projects that deliver real impact to people and businesses.
about.p3: Beyond coding, I value continuous learning and teamwork, believing that sharing knowledge is essential for growing in the tech field.
